source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A rectangular closed loop is placed near an infinitely long current-carrying straight wire. Initially, the loop is in the same plane as the wire, with two sides of the loop parallel to the wire. When the loop moves at the same speed in the three different directions shown in the image, the induced current in the loop is:

choice_map.D: The same in cases I and II.
